description: Filament V2 to V3 migration rules

hop-8-to-9.notes: No Filament breaking changes between Laravel 8 and 9

hop-9-to-10.notes: Filament V3 released with Laravel 10. Form/Table class namespaces moved.

hop-10-to-11.notes: No breaking PHP API changes between Filament V3 minor versions

hop-12-to-13.notes: Filament V5 supports Laravel 12+ with new visual overhaul
